Risk Factors 
Anyone can get it, but factors, like age, can increase someone's risk. 
Sept. 22, 2025 
Vaccination 
All children younger than 5 years old should get Haemophilus influenzae type b or Hib vaccines. 
Sept. 22, 2025 
For Professionals 
Clinical Overview 
Information on diagnosis, prevention guidelines, types of infection, and who's at risk. 
Sept. 22, 2025 
Surveillance and Trends 
CDC tracks invasive cases nationally. Vaccine-preventable cases are low. 
Sept. 22, 2025 
Bacterial Meningitis Lab 
This CDC laboratory focuses on two bacterial causes of meningitis. 
Sept. 22, 2025 
H. influenzae 
H. influenzae (including Hib) are bacteria that can cause severe infections, primarily in children younger than 5 years old.
